description: A sustainability specialist is evaluating a 250 kW Organic Rankine Cycle (ORC) waste heat recovery generator. Model this using the "Generic System" performance model coupled with the "LCOE Calculator (FCR Method)" in SAM. The system has a 250 kW nameplate capacity, 0% degradation/losses, and a generation profile of 200 kW for indices 0-6551 and 7296-8759, with 0 kW for indices 6552-7295. Financial parameters include a $1,250,000 total installed cost, $10,000/year fixed operating cost, $0/kWh variable operating cost, and an 8.0% Fixed Charge Rate (FCR). Save the modeling setup as orc_model.py or orc_model.sam in /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/. Export the resulting annual energy (kWh), capacity factor (%), and LCOE (cents/kWh) to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/orc_recovery_results.json using the keys "annual_energy_kwh", "capacity_factor_percent", and "lcoe_cents_per_kwh".
